data.name: Common_Category
data.value: Common

data.name: Common_ContinueOnError
data.value: If set, continue executing the remaining activities even if the current activity has failed.

data.name: Common_Timeout
data.value: Specifies the amount of time in milliseconds to wait for the activity to run before an error is thrown. The default value is 30000 (30s).

data.name: FreezeUnfreezePanes_Cols_Description
data.value: The number of columns to freeze. Set 0 or leave empty to unfreeze all columns.

data.name: FreezeUnfreezePanes_Description
data.value: Keep rows and columns visible while the rest of the worksheet scrolls.

data.name: FreezeUnfreezePanes_DisplayName
data.value: Freeze/Unfreeze Panes

data.name: FreezeUnfreezePanes_ErrorMsg_MinValue
data.value: The property '{0}' requires a value greater or equal to 0.

data.name: FreezeUnfreezePanes_Rows_Description
data.value: The number of rows to freeze. Set 0 or leave empty to unfreeze all rows.

data.name: FreezeUnfreezePanes_SheetName_Description
data.value: The name of the sheet from the workbook.

data.name: FreezeUnfreezePanes_WorkbookPath_Description
data.value: The workbook file path.

data.name: GetHyperlinks_Description
data.value: Gets all the hyperlinks from the specified cell range.

data.name: GetHyperlinks_DisplayName
data.value: Get Hyperlinks

data.name: GetHyperlinks_Range_Description
data.value: The cell range to look for hyperlinks. If empty, it will look in all used range of the sheet.

data.name: GetHyperlinks_Result_Description
data.value: The hyperlinks found in the specified range.

data.name: GetHyperlinks_SheetName_Description
data.value: The name of the sheet from the workbook.

data.name: GetHyperlinks_WorkbookPath_Description
data.value: The workbook file path.

data.name: GetSheetNames_Description
data.value: Gets all the sheet names from a workbook.

data.name: GetSheetNames_DisplayName
data.value: Get Sheet Names

data.name: GetSheetNames_Result_Description
data.value: The sheet names from the workbook.

data.name: InputOutput_Category
data.value: Reference

data.name: Input_Category
data.value: Input

data.name: InsertHyperlink_Cell_Description
data.value: The cell address (in range format) where the hyperlink will be written. e.g: "A3", "D5", "F9"...

data.name: InsertHyperlink_Description
data.value: Inserts hyperlinks on the specified cell address.

data.name: InsertHyperlink_DisplayName
data.value: Insert Hyperlinks

data.name: InsertHyperlink_Label_Description
data.value: The label/text to write on the specified cell. E.g: "My WebSite"

data.name: InsertHyperlink_Link_Description
data.value: The link to navigate to. Can be an address to URL, Email, File or Workbook Reference.

data.name: InsertHyperlink_Result_Description
data.value: A boolean determining whether the operation was successful or not.

data.name: InsertHyperlink_SheetName_Description
data.value: The name of the sheet from the workbook.

data.name: InsertHyperlink_Tooltip_Description
data.value: The tooltip of the link. This feature only works for Open XML (*.xlsx) formats.

data.name: InsertHyperlink_WorkbookPath_Description
data.value: The workbook file path.

data.name: Options_Category
data.value: Options

data.name: Output_Category
data.value: Output

data.name: ReadRange_AddHeaders_Description
data.value: Specifies if the first row in the range should be considered column headers definitions. If set to false, the columns in the DataTable will use the following pattern "Column{index}", e.g.: Column0, Column1, Column2...

data.name: ReadRange_Description
data.value: Reads the value of a range from a spreadsheet as a DataTable. If the range is not specified, all used cells in the spreadsheet are read. If the range is specified as a cell, all used rows starting from that cell is read.

data.name: ReadRange_DisplayName
data.value: Read Range

data.name: ReadRange_Range_Description
data.value: Specifies the range of cells to be read. If this value is not specified, all used cells of the spreadsheet is read. If the value consists of only one cell, all used rows in the spreadsheet are read starting from that cell.

data.name: ReadRange_Result_Description
data.value: The output DataTable in which the read data is stored.

data.name: ReadRange_SheetName_Description
data.value: The name of the sheet from the workbook.

data.name: RemoveHyperlinks_Description
data.value: Removes the hyperlinks from the specified cell range.

data.name: RemoveHyperlinks_DisplayName
data.value: Remove Hyperlinks

data.name: RemoveHyperlinks_Range_Description
data.value: The cell range to look for hyperlinks and remove them. If empty, it will look in all used range of the sheet.

data.name: RemoveHyperlinks_Result_Description
data.value: The number of links removed on the specified range.

data.name: RemoveHyperlinks_SheetName_Description
data.value: The name of the sheet from the workbook.

data.name: RemoveHyperlinks_WorkbookPath_Description
data.value: The workbook file path.

data.name: ScopeAwareCodeActivity_UseScope
data.value: Uses the workbook instance given by Workbook Scope.

data.name: Validation_NullOrEmpty
data.value: The value for '{0}' is null or empty.

data.name: Validation_ScopeError
data.value: Cannot be used outside of {0} activity.

data.name: Validation_TypeError
data.value: Please provide a value of type {0} for {1}.

data.name: Validation_ValueError
data.value: Please provide a value for {0}.

data.name: WorkbookScope_Description
data.value: Opens a workbook and share its instance across the child activities. The WorkbookPath of this activity is used on the child activities, even if they have their own value is set. The use of this activity is recommended when multiple write operations on the same workbook are going to be performed because only at the end of the scope the file is actually saved, thus the performance is better. For single operations, this activity is unnecessary.

data.name: WorkbookScope_DisplayName
data.value: Workbook Scope

data.name: WorkbookScope_WorkbookPath_Description
data.value: The workbook file path.

data.name: GetColumnCount_DisplayName
data.value: Get Column Count

data.name: GetRowCount_DisplayName
data.value: Get Row Count

data.name: GetColumnCount_Description
data.value: Returns the number of columns in use in the sheet.

data.name: GetRowCount_Description
data.value: Returns the number of rows in use in the worksheet. Note that table headers are also part of the count.

data.name: RenameSheet_DisplayName
data.value: Rename Sheet

data.name: RenameSheet_Description
data.value: Renames a sheet name based on its index (zero-based).

data.name: SaveWorkbook_DisplayName
data.value: Save Workbook

data.name: SaveWorkbook_Description
data.value: Saves the changes to the workbook opened by Workbook Scope.

data.name: ActivateSheet_DisplayName
data.value: Activate Sheet

data.name: ActivateSheet_Description
data.value: Activates the specified sheet

data.name: GetActiveSheet_DisplayName
data.value: Get Active Sheet

data.name: GetActiveSheet_Description
data.value: Returns the index and name of the active sheet.
